title: APN Idle Pack Rights (canonical)
description: Canonical rights contract for every Game Pack (plan v2 §PR-7 / ADR-0009). Declared canonical in PR-0; the enforcing validator + marks denylist land in PR-7. The reconciled echo-pack.schema.json rights sub-object mirrors these field names and enum so a pack's rights block validates against both.

mode.description: Rights posture. `apn-original`: fully original, no editorial reference. `homage-only`: original art + genre homage, no real title anywhere player-facing. `editorial-text-original-art`: original art; real title only in the feed ticker as editorialReference + one non-affiliation line. `licensed-spotlight`: direct branded assets under a written license. `blocked`: must not ship. `pending-review`: transitional — validator WARNS (not blocks) for wave packs only (ADR-0011).

editorialReference.description: Real game title — feed-ticker editorial reference only, never a runtime display name. Empty string only when mode is apn-original.

reviewedBy.description: Human reviewer who cleared the rights posture; null until reviewed. (Canonical field name — supersedes the V3-original `reviewer`.)

reviewStatus.description: Review lifecycle state, distinct from mode (the intended posture).

killSwitch.description: Stable id of the runtime flag that disables this pack.

licenseRecord.description: Present only when mode is licensed-spotlight.

forbiddenMotifs.description: Marks / characters / athletes / trade dress that may never appear as a ref OR in prompt text (packet 01_RIGHTS/forbidden-anchors.txt is the runtime file; gate 4.1).

$comment: PR-7 adds: (1) title-vs-mode check against a marks denylist (a pack whose display title is a raw trademark fails), (2) repo-wide block of `fan-policy-noncommercial` framing, (3) wave-pack warn vs launch-pack block on `pending-review` (ADR-0011).
